     The Numbers Business Report

Norm of the North (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,062,499Details
International Box Office $13,473,161
Worldwide Box Office $30,535,660
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,165,892
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,758,362
Total $4,924,254
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A polar bear of many words, Norm’s greatest gripe is simple: there is no room for tourists in the Arctic. But when a maniacal developer threatens to build luxury condos in his own backyard, Norm does what all normal polar bears would do…he heads to New York City to stop it. With a cast of ragtag lemmings at his side, Norm takes on the big apple, big business and a big identity crisis to save the day.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,844,137 (40.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.49 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:55.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$18,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,411 opening theaters/2,411 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $23,591,614

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 15th, 2016 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: January 14th, 2016 (Wide) (Croatia)
January 14th, 2016 (Wide) (Iraq)
January 14th, 2016 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
January 14th, 2016 (Wide) (Slovenia)
January 14th, 2016 (Wide) (Slovakia)
Video Release: March 29th, 2016 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for mild rude humor and action.
(Rating bulletin 2403 (Cert #50095), 12/9/2015)
Running Time: 93 minutes
Franchise: Norm of the North
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Geographical setting: New York City
Plot point: Corporate Malfeasance, Environment, Talking Animals
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Splash Entertianment, Lionsgate, Assemblage Entertainment , Telegael
Production Countries: United States, India
Languages: English

Synopsis

A polar bear of many words, Norm’s greatest gripe is simple: there is no room for tourists in the Arctic. But when a maniacal developer threatens to build luxury condos in his own backyard, Norm does what all normal polar bears would do…he heads to New York City to stop it. With a cast of ragtag lemmings at his side, Norm takes on the big apple, big business and a big identity crisis to save the day.
